title: neotinea × dietrichiana
intro: Neotinea × dietrichiana, also known as the Dietrich's Neotinea or the hybrid of the Neotinea ustulata and Neotinea nidus-avis orchids, is a rare and unique orchid species found in Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Neotinea × dietrichiana is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to promote overall health and well-being.
